training_container_id.description: Optional UUID of a training_container whose icd_config maps hyperparams → env vars and declares the metrics/weights output paths. When omitted, hyperparams map to uppercased-key env vars and the default /output/metrics.json + /output/weights/ paths are used.

git_url.description: Git repository cloned per run; its entry_point is executed as the training command. Any trainer that reads DATASET_PATH/OUTPUT_DIR and writes metrics.json + weights works.

branch.description: Optional branch/tag/ref to check out. Defaults to the repository's default branch.

entry_point.description: Python script (relative to repo root) run as the training command. Defaults to train.py.

hyperparams.description: Key/value pairs forwarded to the training command as env vars via icd_config.inputs (e.g. epochs, batch_size, seed).
